---
name: New source suggestion
about: Suggest a feed or web-search target for an existing preset
title: "[source] "
labels: enhancement, sources
---

**Source name + URL**
<!-- e.g. "Allen AI blog — https://allenai.org/blog" -->

**Which preset?**
<!-- ai (default) | security | biotech | fintech -->

**Does it have a working RSS/Atom feed?**
<!-- Paste the feed URL and confirm it returns HTTP 200. If there's no reliable
feed, it can still be added as a WEB_SEARCH_TARGET. -->

**Why is it high-signal?**
One or two sentences: what does this source surface that the current set
misses, and how often does it publish?
